name: Hello World OKPF Pack
title: Hello World
description: The smallest useful OKPF example: one Markdown artifact with license, attribution, and usage policy.

license.details: Example content may be reused with attribution.

usage_policy.notes: Intended as a minimal OKPF validation and inspection example.

expert_notes.rationale: Keep the first example small enough to understand at a glance.
assumptions: Readers can inspect Markdown and JSON by hand.
limitations: This example does not demonstrate provenance, dependencies, or integrity hashes.
expert_notes.decision_basis: Use one Markdown artifact plus essential package context.
expert_notes.review_notes: This field is human-authored context, not private model reasoning traces.
